translated: Thank you. I'd like to request "Synshine Smile," which was performed during the double encore of the 7th Live Aichi Day 2.
Thank you.
Yeah.
I was so happy we could all sing it together with Liella!, so I'd love to hear it during lunch.
Thank you.
We got that request. Thank you. We read your letter too.
Thank you.
You know, for that double encore, I actually thought we were going to do "Open the Gate" again.
I was like, "Wait, are we doing Open the Gate three times this time?" but then I heard it was "Synshine Smile."
I thought, "Oh, I guess so. Three times would be a bit much," but...
You never know, though. We might do it three times someday.
That would be intense.
Anyway, please have a listen.
Liella! with "Synshine Smile."
Let's sing together
Connecting my heart
Let's make it shine, my
star of smiles
Even if I could go anywhere in the past or future, I'd surely stay right here, savoring this moment with you forever.
Small twinkles, one by one, meeting and adding joy, even through the pain...
...I learned the feeling of fun with my friends.
I'm dreaming.
I'm just so absorbed, I love it so much I forget to sleep. I don't need freedom
at all.
I realized it.
Even if a night comes where I can't see a thing, I'll find the courage to try and smile.
That sparkle is bound to reach
you.
Smiles sparkling.
Look,
Everyone's sparkling.
I wanted to tell you, so I let my pen glide, and the world smiled as if we were meeting for the first time.
I feel like I can grab even the smallest glow, so I reach out my hand.
It was kind of funny, so I burst out laughing.
It's always dazzling, no matter when.
I can do more, I can do more. My heart is pounding uncontrollably.
I won't be late.
Connecting
the joy, smiles sparkling.
Now,
Sparkling with you.
We've been put under a spell.
A spell called a dream that won't end even as time passes.
It won't break until it comes true.
No.
No one can stop us anymore.
That's right, we're dreaming.
Because I realized
I don't need freedom.
Even if a night comes where I can't see a thing, I'll find the courage to try and smile.
That sparkle is bound to reach you.
Smiles sparkling.
Look,
Everyone's sparkling, let's sing together.
Connecting my heart, let's make it shine
my star of smiles.
Love Live! Superstar!! Yuigaoka Girls' High School Lunchtime Broadcast Station: Lieradi!
News from Love Live! Superstar!! regarding Blu-ray info.
On Wednesday, June 24th, we will release the "Love Live! Superstar!! Liella! 1st Generation Live & Special Live Blu-ray Box."
It includes the Revival Tokyo Day 2 and the Special Live.
Bonus footage includes behind-the-scenes making-of for both the Revival and Special Live.
Plus, it comes with a cassette tape of "Shooting Voice" live recordings (1st Gen and 2nd/3rd Gen versions)...
...and a cast booklet.
Also, those who pre-order at target stores by April 15th will receive a cassette-style acrylic keychain.
It's a memorial package where you can enjoy the Revival Live tracing the 1st Gen's journey and the one-night-only Special Live, so don't forget to pre-order.
Next is music info.
On Wednesday, July 8th, the "Liella! Connecting Project Mini Album" will be released.
We'll release five versions: Original, Photo, Team Children, Team Sports, and Team Green.
The Original, Team Children, Team Sports, and Team Green versions feature new illustrations.
The Photo version uses new photos of the cast.
It's scheduled to include 4 songs, including one new group song, plus off-vocal versions for a total of 8 tracks.
As a first-press bonus, the Original, Team Children,
Team Sports, and Team Green versions include member stickers, while the Photo version includes purikura-style stickers.
All versions include a lottery application ticket for the Love Live! Series 15th Anniversary Love Live! Fes Love Live! Superstar!! presale.
Plus, as a bundle purchase bonus, you'll get a Liella! sticker book.
Don't forget to pre-order.
To celebrate the release of the "Liella! Connecting Project Mini Album," we'll be holding handover events.
The dates are Friday, October 2nd and Friday, October 9th.
Those who pre-order or purchase the "Liella! Connecting Project Mini Album" at target stores
will be invited to the handover event via lottery.
